title: Exception queue
subtitle: What needs you — and what's already been adopted (by the system or by you).
adoptedCaption: predicted value adopted — system + your approvals
forecastAtRiskCaption: advisory — speculative demand, no action required

resolvePrompt.material: How can I resolve order {{order}}? It's at-risk waiting on material — evaluate expediting the material or moving the due date.
resolvePrompt.due_before_start: How can I resolve order {{order}}? It's due before the line can start it — evaluate moving the due date or expediting; re-sequencing can't fix it.
resolvePrompt.working_window: How can I resolve order {{order}}? It won't fit the open shift time before due — evaluate adding overtime or moving the due date.
resolvePrompt.capacity: How can I resolve order {{order}}? Its line is at capacity — evaluate my options to clear it (reroute to another line, add overtime, or move the due date).
resolvePrompt.default: How can I resolve order {{order}}? Evaluate the options to bring it back on time.

legend.title: What the tags mean
legend.t1: A high-confidence prediction the system can auto-apply — shown for your approval (Pre-adjust) or snooze (Dismiss).
legend.t3: Always human: a firm at-risk order the system never resolves on its own — review and decide.
legend.approved: You approved the pre-adjust — the value was adopted because you said so.
legend.auto: The system adopted it on its own (confidence ≥ the threshold) — shown for transparency, no action needed.

pred.statement: Predicted to cross threshold ~{{crossing}} · confidence {{conf}}% · {{horizon}} horizon
pred.autoStatement: Pre-emptively adjusted for predicted wear · cross ~{{crossing}} · confidence {{conf}}% · {{horizon}} horizon
pred.approvedStatement: You approved the pre-adjust for predicted wear · cross ~{{crossing}} · confidence {{conf}}% · {{horizon}} horizon
pred.resurfaced: Back — you set this aside at {{wasConf}}% / {{wasHorizon}}; now {{conf}}% / {{horizon}} (cross ~{{crossing}})
pred.action: Pre-adjust: pre-emptively adopt the predicted cycle time in the next re-solve to protect downstream (current plan unchanged · reversible). Dismiss snoozes: keep standard times, re-ask only when more certain or imminent.
